subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh the truth and remindeth mankind in these days wherein clouds of grievous sorrow have been raised aloft [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و یذکر الناس فی ایام التی فیها ارتفعت سحاب غم محزونا و
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
